output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT(YEAR(?silverBirthDate) AS ?silverBirthYear) WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q2785517 ; rdfs:label ?eventLabel ; wdt:P577 ?eventTime .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(regex(?eventLabel , 'European Women Judo Championships' , 'i'))
  .
  FILTER(YEAR(?eventTime) = 1994)
  .
  ?goldMedalist p:P3867 [ ps:P3867 ?event ; pq:P1178 "1" ] .
  ?goldMedalist wdt:P27 wd:Q21 .
  ?silverMedalist p:P3867 [ ps:P3867 ?event ; pq:P1178 "2" ] .
  ?silverMedalist wdt:P569 ?silverBirthDate .
}
